ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Gaussian, Multinomial, Complement, Bernoulli, LDA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., tabular, text, image) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metrics belong to */,
  "mean_cv_score" REAL /* Mean cross-validation score */,
  "std_cv_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of cross-validation scores */,
  "var_cv_score" REAL /* Variance of cross-validation scores */,
  "test_accuracy" TEXT /* Test accuracy as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the metrics */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training log record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training ended */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for training the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the training process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation log record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation ended */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for evaluating the model */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the evaluation process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was deployed (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Any issues encountered during deployment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the deployment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for deployment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash from version control */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the permission is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is granted to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment or feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the comment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that has the dependency */,
  "dependent_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent model (if applicable) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the model depends on (e.g., dataset, library) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the dependency */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the dependency is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_dependent_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dependencies_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
